title: trigonella edelbergii
intro: Trigonella edelbergii, also known as Bergamotelin, is a plant species within the Fabaceae family, native to India. It contains compounds like trigonelline, which exhibits medicinal properties, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and neuroprotective activities. The health benefits of Trigonella edelbergii include its potential to reduce blood sugar levels, improve cognitive function, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Trigonella edelbergii is used in herbal preparations, such as capsules, teas, and extracts, to leverage its medicinal and health benefits.
